---
title: "executor.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/core/engine/executor.py"
loc: 36
complexity: 6
logic_score: 3.05
style_score: 3.67
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 6.39
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating SovereignExecutor, __init__.

## Interaction Protocol
Import SovereignExecutor and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 7 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.core.engine.cortex](file://src.core.engine.cortex)

### Exports
- `SovereignExecutor`
- `__init__`
- `handle_proactive`
- `suggest_forge`
- `handle_cortex_query`
